highlights.text: I wrote yesterday at 4pm: “ We are in a mild dip now and for tomorrow the bull case is quite simple: 6060 has to recover, which would squeeze us up to 6074, 6092.

The magnet for this pullback was the low 6060s, and as I wrote on Friday at 4pm, this region was a critical zone which back-tests the area we broke out from on December 6th (which triggered the most recent, leg up to 6111).

I wrote then: “It would not shock me if this 6063 level turned into a “magnet level” which we trap below over over for several days and build a new base”, and we spent all day yesterday essentially testing this level, putting in over 8 tests between Monday and Tuesday, before flushing it late day yesterday.
This is essential to know as we see this type of action several times a month around a magnet level.

post_title: The Dip Was (as usual) Bought In SPX. ATHs Next? Not So Fast. Dec 12 Plan
